## Description

Brief summary of the changes and their purpose.

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement to an existing feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`bash tests/e2eTests/run-all.sh`) if endpoint behavior changed
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] XML doc comments added on all new public members
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] ADR added/updated if a significant design decision was made
